description_long: This object is a classic AK-47 style assault rifle, featuring a wooden fixed stock and handguard with a dark, polished finish. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from blackened metal, giving the rifle a robust and utilitarian appearance. The magazine is a curved, detachable box type, typically used for 7.62x39mm cartridges. Iron sights are mounted on the top of the barrel and receiver, with a front post and rear notch. The muzzle is fitted with a simple slant compensator, characteristic of this rifle type. The overall design is iconic, with a blend of wood and metal materials and a rugged, functional aesthetic.
description: A classic AK-47 style rifle with a wooden fixed stock, black metal receiver, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, with the barrel, receiver, and magazine aligned in a narrow silhouette.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the wooden stock, handguard, and magazine.
description_view_3: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight post, and the rounded end of the wooden stock.
